ogTitle: Weeroona Island vs Welland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weeroona Island and Welland.
heading: Weeroona Island vs Welland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weeroona Island, South Australia and Welland, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Weeroona Island has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Welland (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weeroona Island or Welland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weeroona Island has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Welland scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weeroona Island scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Welland scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weeroona Island or Welland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Weeroona Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
